post.description:
Chat agent streaming endpoint.

Uses VercelAIAdapter to handle parsing, agent execution, and streaming
in Vercel AI SDK protocol format.

get.description: List all knowledge sources for the current user.

post.description: Create a new knowledge source and validate if it's an Obsidian vault.

get.description: Return default values for creating a knowledge source.
Get a single knowledge source by ID.
List books grouped by subfolder for a knowledge source.

post.description: Re-validate an existing knowledge source connection.

Ingest a single document from a knowledge source.

Args:
    source_id: The knowledge source ID
    relative_path: Path relative to knowledge source root (e.g., "Brain Dump.md")

Ingest all markdown documents from a knowledge source.

Discovers all .md files in the vault (excluding system directories like .obsidian)
and ingests them into the database with embeddings. Manages source lifecycle
(status transitions, timestamps, stats).

Args:
    source_id: The knowledge source ID
    force_reindex: If True, re-ingest documents even if already indexed
Parse PDF metadata for preview before upload confirmation.
Upload a PDF book, save to vault, and trigger background ingestion.

get.description: List all threads for the authenticated user.
Get all messages for a specific thread.

delete.description: Delete a thread and all its messages.

get.description: Get the current user, auto-creating on first login.

patch.description: Update the current user's personalization settings.

Response containing thread messages.

Messages are returned in their raw JSONB format as stored in the database,
which includes role, content, and metadata fields.
